name: zagrosi-forge
description: Zagrosi Forge Codex-native project decomposition, planning, quality gates, traceability, and TDD implementation skills.

interface.shortDescription: Plan and implement complex work with TDD
interface.longDescription: Zagrosi Forge provides three Codex-native workflows: decompose broad project ideas into focused specs, create reviewed TDD implementation plans, and implement generated sections with tests, review, documentation, git hygiene, quality gates, traceability, risk registers, decision logs, and Forge helper checks.
defaultPrompt: Use $zagrosi-project to split this project idea into planning specs
Use $zagrosi-plan to create a reviewed TDD implementation plan
Use $zagrosi-implement to build these sections with TDD
